conversation.text: I want to arrange a demo of CINNOX.

Great to hear you're interested in CINNOX! I'd love to help arrange that for you.

To get you connected with the right team, may I start with your name?
Emma Laurent, Lyon Digital Agency, emma@lyondigital.com

Nice to meet you, Emma! And thanks for that info.

Just one more detail — what's a phone number we can reach you on?
I'd rather not give my phone number.
No problem at all, Emma! We can reach you by email instead. Would that work for you?
I really don't want to share it. Please proceed without it.

Understood, Emma — no problem at all. Let me confirm what I have:

- **Name:** Emma Laurent
- **Company:** Lyon Digital Agency
- **Email:** emma@lyondigital.com

Is that all correct?

Thank you, Emma! Your information has been saved.

Now, regarding the demo — let me connect you with our sales team who can schedule that for you. They'll reach out to you at emma@lyondigital.com to arrange a convenient time.I'm connecting you with our sales team now. They'll be with you shortly. 😊
